zh.lifeSummary: 當Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan於0973年1月1日出生在法國布列塔尼迪南時，他的父親Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentin29歲，母親Helene de Port30歲。他於0997年與Countess Rantlina de Blois在法國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1031年11月15日在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南享年58歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan于0973年1月1日出生在法国布列塔尼迪南时，他的父亲Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentin29岁，母亲Helene de Port30岁。他于0997年与Countess Rantlina de Blois在法国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1031年11月15日在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南享年58岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱可利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Hammon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Ken): variant of   Hammond  .

variants.name: Hammond
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Ha(i)mon, the oblique case form of the ancient Germanic Ha(i)mo, a short form of various compound names beginning with haim ‘home’. It frequently developed excrescent -d, giving Hamond, Haimund, and Hawmond. Alternatively, the name could derive from the Middle English personal name Hamund (Old Norse Hámundr, composed of the elements hár ‘high’ + mund ‘protection’), which may have been used in Normandy and in 12th-century eastern England, but the former explanation is more likely. The surname was sometimes confused with Almond and Ammon .

English: in the Bradford area of Yorkshire, the name is a shortened form of Ormondroyd, formerly Hamondesrode, from a lost place in Birstall (Yorkshire), named with the Middle English (Old French) personal name Hamon (1 above) + Middle English roid, a southern Yorkshire pronunciation of Old English rod ‘clearing’.
Irish: generally an importation from England, but occasionally an adopted name for Mac Ámoinn, see McCammon .

en.lifeSummary: When Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan was born on 1 January 0973, in Dinan, Brittany, France, his father, Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentin, was 29 and his mother, Helene de Port, was 30. He married Countess Rantlina de Blois in 0997, in France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 November 1031, in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Creully, Caen, Calvados, Normandy, France.

historicEvents.description: En breton et en gallo, le nom est également orthographié Dinan. Il est prononcé [ˈdĩːnãn] en breton KLT. D'après Bernard Tanguy, c'est le nom breton qui pourrait expliquer son origine, constitué des mots din « forteresse » ou « fortin » et du suffixe diminutif an, c'est-à-dire la « petite forteresse ».  L'étymologie de Dinan a cependant donné lieu à plusieurs autres hypothèses et conjectures. Il proviendrait du gaulois Dun désignant une colline, une hauteur propre à la défense et Ahna déesse protectrice des vivants et gardienne des morts. La région de Dinan est habitée depuis le Néolithique. L’histoire de Dinan est mieux connue à partir du XIe siècle

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan est né le 1 janvier 0973, à Dinan, Bretagne, France, son père, Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentin, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Helene de Port, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Countess Rantlina de Blois en 0997, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1031, à Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Creully, Caen, Calvados, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan am 1. Januar 0973 in Dinan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentin 29 und seine Mutter Helene de Port 30. Er hat 0997 in Frankreich Countess Rantlina de Blois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. November 1031 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Creully, Caen, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan è nato il il 1 gennaio 0973 nel Dinan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentin, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Helene de Port, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Countess Rantlina de Blois nel 0997, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 novembre 1031, nel Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Creully, Caen, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinanが0973年1月1日にフランスブレタグンディナンで生まれた時，父Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentinは29歳，母Helene de Portは30歳であった。0997年にフランスでCountess Rantlina de Bloisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1031年11月15日にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーディナンで58歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディカルヴァドスケンクレウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan(이)가 0973년 1월 1일 프랑스 브레타그니 딘아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentin(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Helene de Port(은)는 30세였다. 그는 0997년 프랑스에서 Countess Rantlina de Blois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1031년 11월 15일 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 딘아에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 카이 크레우리에 묻혔다.

mn.1 January 973–15 November 1031: 0973 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1–1031 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 15

pt.1 January 973–15 November 1031: 1 de janeiro de 0973–15 de novembro de 1031
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 0973, em Dinan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentin, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Helene de Port, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess Rantlina de Blois em 0997, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1031, em Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Creully, Caen, Calvados, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan родился 1 января 0973 г. в местности динан, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentin было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Helene de Port, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Rantlina de Blois в 0997 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 ноября 1031 г. в местности динан, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности креулли, каен, калвадос, норманди, Франция.

sm.from 1015 to 1060: mai le 1015 e o'o I le 1060

es.1 January 973–15 November 1031: 1 de enero de 0973–15 de noviembre de 1031
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan nació el 1 de enero de 0973, en Dinan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Roger de Saint-Saveur Lord de Cotentin, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Helene de Port, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Countess Rantlina de Blois en 0997, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1031, en Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Creully, Caen, Calvados, Normandie, Francia.
